The Case

A neighborhood. A rulebook. A $1 deal.

In October 2023, the Marvin Creek HOA board voted — without notifying homeowners — to grant the Village of Marvin a permanent public trail easement across private CCR-protected land for $1. The neighborhood's own rulebook contains an explicit prohibition: a notwithstanding clause. An absolute bar. The board never obtained the 80% homeowner vote required by N.C.G.S. § 47F-3-112.

An independent attorney called it void ab initio. A survey found 63% of homeowners opposed it. The HOA president wrote the Village Manager: "We continue to believe the easement should be returned." The trial court found the plaintiffs likely to succeed on appeal and issued a Rule 62 injunction halting the trail. The injunction is operative today.

$1Easement price
200+Documents catalogued
3Active cases · no merits answer
FREEThe Record access
Injunction
Operative

In September 2025, the Union County Superior Court — the trial court — issued a Rule 62 injunction finding the Comiskeys "likely to succeed on appeal." Rule 62 is a trial court mechanism that preserves the status quo while an appeal is pending. Trail development is halted. No party has challenged it.

October 2023

HOA board votes without community notice to grant a perpetual $1 trail easement. No 80% vote. CCR notwithstanding clause violated. MDO § 1.8-3 violated. The easement is void from inception.

January–April 2024

Jan 1: Village employee Derek Durst trespasses and threatens violence in front of the Comiskey children. Jan 22: HOA meeting — "I can't wait to get blitzed out of my mind and stumble home." Apr 19: Independent attorney Roy Michaux confirms the board "far exceeded its authority."

October 2024

63% of homeowners oppose the easement. HOA President Damani formally requests its return. The Village says no. Eminent domain threats delivered through the HOA's own conflicted counsel. Board reverses.

October 28, 2025 — +5 Days

Five days after Chris Comiskey's protected speech, UCSO attorney Brandon Christian issues the Dirty Harry letter on official letterhead. The family is restricted to 911-only law enforcement — the only agency at their address. 149+ days operative. Case No. 3:26-cv-00159.

November–December 2025

Nov 4: Election Day threat. Lein resignation vacancy scheme. 70-30 electoral repudiation. Nov 2025: Anonymous employer complaint filed against Chris at RTX. Dec 2025: Mayor Pro Tem Vandenberg captured on hot mic to Village Attorney Spencer: "Keep me out of jail."

March 26, 2026 — Active Settlement

Village counsel Jake Stewart transmits MAR-2: easement return, Vandenberg carved out, $0 monetary. The Comiskeys' posture: accept and interpret on plain terms. The injunction is operative. No defendant has answered on the merits in any of the three active cases.

The Platform — v7

The Record is a real tool. Free. No login.

Nine tabs. Thirty smoking guns. Two hundred cross-referenced documents. AI-powered analysis. A force-directed actor network. A five-phase VOM pattern map. A document grid with five interrelation chains and eight legal issue maps. One Heel Splitter game.

🔥
30 Entries · 4 Tiers · AI Analysis
Smoking Guns + AI

Thirty documented facts, each with legal analysis and courtroom application. Select any smoking gun and Claude generates a structured brief — legal theory, evidentiary weight, cross-examination leverage, settlement value — from the case record.

🗺️
65 Key Docs · 5 Clusters · 8 Legal Issues
Document Map

Four views: sortable document grid; five meta-tag interrelation chains; eight legal issue maps linking specific documents to specific claims; six-era timeline from 2005 through April 2026. Dimming logic highlights relevant documents when a cluster or issue is active.

🕸️
19 Actors · 22 Edges · 3 Sub-Views
Actor Network

D3 force-directed graph of every documented relationship. Click any actor to see their connections, faction, role, and case-specific notes. Also available as a hierarchy view by faction and an actor × event involvement matrix.

📈
5 Phases · Oct 2023 → Present
VOM Pattern

Five-phase escalation arc — Property Seizure, Community Suppression, Legal Enforcement, Retaliation, Settlement Maneuvering. Each phase: timeline events, actors, harm types, legal theories, severity rating.

The Merchandise

Ten officials. Ten quotes. All on the record.

Every item in our collection is a direct quote from a public official made in a public forum, preserved in the public record, and linked in the Record to its primary source document. Not satire. Not paraphrases. The actual words, with the actual timestamps.

Each item ships with a QR code on the tag linking directly to the source document. Buy the merch. Read the receipt.

The Album

The score this drama deserves.

Some Good Songs
The Comiskey Family Album  ·  Three World Premieres

Some Good Songs was made alongside this case — not because of it, but through it. Written and recorded while filings were being drafted, while children were tucked in, while the same family defending their home in court was also just living in it.

We are formally inviting Lin-Manuel Miranda's attention. The story is documented. The characters wrote their own lines. The $1,000 tier is named after him.

Listen & Watch

Lin-Manuel, if you're reading this —

The HOA attorney threatened eminent domain against the HOA's own members. The UCSO attorney quoted Dirty Harry on official letterhead. The Mayor Pro Tem whispered "keep me out of jail" on a hot mic. The electorate voted her out 70-30. Her husband left a five-exclamation-point YouTube review of the family album.

The material is documented. The music is made. The $1,000 tier is waiting.

The story exists The music is made The door is open

Legal Note

Every quote on our merchandise was made by a public official in a public forum and is preserved in the public record with a timestamp. Every item links to its source document in the Record. We are not mocking private citizens. We are quoting public officials on the public record with full attribution. That is what the First Amendment is for. There is an entire tab in the Record dedicated to it. It is free to access.
